mapper.select: select decode(msg_field, null, db_field, msg_field) as db_field, col_name_zh , rec_id from tfm_alarm_col_info where (msg_field is not null or db_field = 'rule_name') and col_disp_type = 1
select t.template_id,t.template_name,t.description,t.owner_id,u.user_name,t.create_time,t.columns_value from tfp_column_template t,tai_userinfo u where u.user_id=t.owner_id and template_id=0
select t.template_id as id , t.template_name as txt from tfp_column_template t

select level_0_value, level_0_label,level_1_value, level_1_label,level_2_value, level_2_label from (select distinct nvl(city_id, '0') as level_0_value, nvl(city_name, '0') as level_0_label, nvl(region_id, '0') as level_1_value, nvl(region_name, '0') as level_1_label, nvl(province_id, '0') as level_2_value, nvl(province_name, '0') as level_2_label from region_city_local order by level_2_value, level_1_value, level_0_value) A
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='active_status' and valid = 1 order by IDENTIFIER
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='network_type_top' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='professional_type' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='network_type' and valid = 1 order by value
select ID, TXT from (select nvl(type, '0') as id, nvl(vendor_text, '0') as txt from vendor_name where type >=0 order by vendor_text) A
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='object_class' and valid = 1 order by value
select distinct t.group_id id, t.group_name txt from tai_group_info t where t.group_type_id = 1 order by t.group_name
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='object_class' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='org_severity' and valid = 1 order by IDENTIFIER
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='alarm_resource_status' and valid = 1 order by value

select '省部接口上报' as id, '省部接口上报' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采话务' as id, '集团直采话务' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采数据' as id, '集团直采数据' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采传输' as id, '集团直采传输' as txt from tia_condition_def union select '集团直采国际局' as id, '集团直采国际局' as txt from tia_condition_def
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='alarm_query_type' and valid = 1 order by IDENTIFIER
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='preprocess_flag' and valid = 1 order by IDENTIFIER
select distinct a.id, a.txt from ( select '3,7' id, '成功' txt from dual union all select '4,10,11' id, '失败' txt from dual) a
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='ack_flag' and valid = 1 order by IDENTIFIER
select id, txt from (select distinct 0 id, '否' txt from dual union select distinct -1 id, '是' txt from dual) a
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='send_status' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='sheet_status' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='gcss_client_level' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='gcss_service_level' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='interrupt_circuit_state' and valid = 1 order by value
select IDENTIFIER id, value txt from alarm_dict_mapper where dict_name='sub_alarm_type' and valid = 1 order by value
select id, txt from (select distinct 'allFilters' id, '全部过滤器' txt from dual union select distinct 'myFilters' id, '我的过滤器' txt from dual union select distinct 'ruleFitlers' id, '派单规则' txt from dual) a
